title: Open-only OMOP vocabulary mapping pack
context: The OMOP CDM crosswalk (crosswalk-001) maps CDE fields to OMOP CDM structure but the OMOP Standardized Vocabularies have mixed per-vocab licences — some require SNOMED CT or CPT licences, which are restricted. A dedicated open-only OMOP vocabulary mapping pack provides adopters with the complete set of mappings that use only open-licensed OMOP member vocabularies (excluding SNOMED and CPT-licenced vocabs). This is unscheduled backlog, extending the crosswalk-001 work. Depends on vocab-001 and crosswalk-001 being merged, and requires licence reviewer sign-off.
objective: Produce an open-only OMOP vocabulary mapping pack (`vocab/omop-open-pack/`) covering the full set of CDE field mappings to OMOP Standardized Vocabulary concepts, using only open-licensed OMOP member vocabularies. Excluded vocabs (those requiring SNOMED CT or CPT licences) are documented in a restriction notes file. Every mapping carries provenance, and the CI licence linter must pass.
acceptanceCriteria: Mapping pack covers all CDE fields with OMOP Standardized Vocabulary concept mappings, using only open-licensed OMOP member vocabularies.
SNOMED CT-licenced and CPT-licenced OMOP vocabularies are explicitly excluded; the exclusion is documented in a restriction notes file with the licence reason.
Every mapping carries provenance: OMOP vocabulary name, version, concept ID, retrieval date, licence/status per `sources/allowlist.yml`.
All open OMOP vocabularies used have status: approved in `sources/allowlist.yml` signed off by the licence reviewer.
CI licence deny-list linter passes; `pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint` green.
output: A `vocab/omop-open-pack/` directory with open-only OMOP vocabulary mappings and restriction notes, committed via PR with licence reviewer sign-off.
